title: HTTP Health Check Aggregator
description:
Each line is `endpoint code1,code2,code3,code4,code5` — the last 5 HTTP status codes observed.

Classify each endpoint:
- `down` — all 5 codes are non-2xx
- `degraded` — 3 or more codes are non-2xx (but not all 5)
- `healthy` — fewer than 3 codes are non-2xx

Return only `down` and `degraded` endpoints as `endpoint status`, sorted alphabetically. Return empty string if all are healthy.
